zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel於1138年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，他的父親William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel40歲，母親Adeliza de Louvain35歲。他和Matilda de Saint-Hilaire至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1193年12月24日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel was born in 1138, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, was 40 and his mother, Adeliza de Louvain, was 35. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Matilda de Saint-Hilaire. He died on 24 December 1193, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel est né en 1138, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adeliza de Louvain, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Matilda de Saint-Hilaire. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1193, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Matilda de Saint-Hilaire mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1193 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundelが1138年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundelは40歳，母Adeliza de Louvainは35歳であった。彼はMatilda de Saint-Hilaireとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1193年12月24日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムウイモンドハム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel(이)가 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza de Louvain(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Matilda de Saint-Hilaire(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1193년 12월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함 윈이몽함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Matilda de Saint-Hilaire. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1193, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel родился в 1138 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William d'Aubigny 1st Earl of Arundel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza de Louvain, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Matilda de Saint-Hilaire. Он умер 24 декабря 1193 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам эбби, вимондхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
